creator: mcclain@looneys.net
text:
Samba 2.0.0 port does not allow connections from accounts where the username and password match (aka Joe's)

Tested on winnt4wks+sp4, encryption enabled on samba.

Fix: 

Set username to something other than the username.
How-To-Repeat: add a user to the samba system: smbpasswd -a username
set the password to match the username
attempt to login from winnt workstation4+sp4
